mapper.select: SELECT p.fxtm_pbls_data_oid, p.fxtm_pbls_data_ttl, p.aut, p.page_num, p.pblcn_dt, p.cvr_img1_oid, p.cvr_img2_oid, p.open_yn, p.use_yn, p.inq_cnt, p.sort_seq, p.reg_id, p.reg_dt, p.mdfcn_id, p.mdfcn_dt, f1.orgnl_file_nm AS cover_file_name, f2.orgnl_file_nm AS full_file_name FROM ${schema}.fxtm_pbls_data p LEFT JOIN ${schema}.file f1 ON p.cvr_img1_oid = f1.file_oid LEFT JOIN ${schema}.file f2 ON p.cvr_img2_oid = f2.file_oid WHERE p.fxtm_pbls_data_oid = #{fxtmPblsDataOid} AND p.use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT fxtm_pbls_sect_oid, fxtm_pbls_data_oid, fxtm_pbls_sect_type, fxtm_pbls_sect_ttl, sort_seq, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.fxtm_pbls_sect WHERE fxtm_pbls_data_oid = #{fxtmPblsDataOid} ORDER BY sort_seq, fxtm_pbls_sect_oid

SELECT i.fxtm_pbls_item_oid, i.fxtm_pbls_sect_oid, i.fxtm_pbls_item_ttl, i.aut, i.page_num, i.atch_file_oid, i.sort_seq, i.reg_id, i.reg_dt, i.mdfcn_id, i.mdfcn_dt, f.orgnl_file_nm AS attach_file_name FROM ${schema}.fxtm_pbls_item i LEFT JOIN ${schema}.FILE f ON i.atch_file_oid = f.file_oid WHERE i.fxtm_pbls_sect_oid = #{fxtmPblsSectOid} ORDER BY i.sort_seq, i.fxtm_pbls_item_oid
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ${schema}.fxtm_pbls_data ( fxtm_pbls_data_ttl, aut, page_num, pblcn_dt, cvr_img1_oid, cvr_img2_oid, open_yn, use_yn, inq_cnt, sort_seq, reg_id, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{fxtmPblsDataTtl}, #{aut}, #{pageNum}, #{pblcnDt}, #{cvrImg1Oid}, #{cvrImg2Oid}, #{openYn}, 'Y', 0, COALESCE(#{sortSeq}, 0), #{regId}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO ${schema}.fxtm_pbls_sect ( fxtm_pbls_data_oid, fxtm_pbls_sect_type, fxtm_pbls_sect_ttl, sort_seq, reg_id, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{fxtmPblsDataOid}, #{fxtmPblsSectType}, #{fxtmPblsSectTtl}, COALESCE(#{sortSeq}, 0), #{regId}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO ${schema}.fxtm_pbls_item ( fxtm_pbls_sect_oid, fxtm_pbls_item_ttl, aut, page_num, atch_file_oid, sort_seq, reg_id, reg_dt ) VALUES ( #{fxtmPblsSectOid}, #{fxtmPblsItemTtl}, #{aut}, #{pageNum}, #{atchFileOid}, COALESCE(#{sortSeq}, 0), #{regId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE ${schema}.fxtm_pbls_data SET fxtm_pbls_data_ttl = #{fxtmPblsDataTtl}, aut = #{aut}, page_num = #{pageNum}, pblcn_dt = #{pblcnDt}, cvr_img1_oid = #{cvrImg1Oid}, cvr_img2_oid = #{cvrImg2Oid}, open_yn = #{openYn}, mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId}, mdfcn_dt = NOW() WHERE fxtm_pbls_data_oid = #{fxtmPblsDataOid}

UPDATE ${schema}.fxtm_pbls_sect
fxtm_pbls_sect_type = #{fxtmPblsSectType},
fxtm_pbls_sect_ttl = #{fxtmPblsSectTtl},
sort_seq = #{sortSeq},
mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId}, mdfcn_dt = NOW()
WHERE fxtm_pbls_sect_oid = #{fxtmPblsSectOid}

UPDATE ${schema}.fxtm_pbls_item SET fxtm_pbls_item_ttl = #{fxtmPblsItemTtl}, aut = #{aut}, page_num = #{pageNum}, atch_file_oid = #{atchFileOid}, sort_seq = #{sortSeq}, mdfcn_id = #{mdfcnId}, mdfcn_dt = NOW() WHERE fxtm_pbls_item_oid = #{fxtmPblsItemOid}
UPDATE ${schema}.fxtm_pbls_data SET use_yn = 'N', mdfcn_dt = NOW() WHERE fxtm_pbls_data_oid = #{fxtmPblsDataOid}
